title: rubus puberulus
intro: Rubus puberulus, also known as the hairy raspberry or rough raspberry, is a species of bramble native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus puberulus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
